utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Travel_coverage is missing. Health coverage is partially fragmented but present with costs. Additional_services has costs. Total_budget present. Therefore, 3 items appear but health is split; still counts as covered since health_coverage with costs exists, though details are not perfectly aligned. Count fully specified per requested details: health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs – they provided mental under health_coverage and physical under a separate key with costs; collectively it meets the requirement. property_coverage: missing. travel_coverage: missing. additional_services: present with costs. total_budget: present with monthly/annual breakdown. So 3 out of 5 fully specified.
